goal: Rebuild card description pipeline into a machine-usable numeric rule system with two active card categories only (立论/策术), while preserving separate flavor text for display.
constraints: Battle/card active taxonomy must stay at two categories only: 立论 and 策术.
Do not manually rewrite the full 170-card corpus one-by-one; use deterministic normalization at data boundary.
Keep flavor text and executable rule text separated.
Use integer-only values in normalized rule payloads and text.
Keep changes scoped to card data mapping, battle card model/runtime usage, and directly related card UI text rendering.
deliverables: Conflict arbitration record for replacing narrative-only card descriptions with structured numeric rules.
Card data model includes structured rule payload + normalized rule text for backend parsing.
showcase/catalog card views display normalized规则 text and keep风味文本独立展示.
battleV2 card model/runtime can consume structured rule payload while remaining compatible with existing effect fields.
Verification notes from typecheck and task finalize commands.
